name: koha-plugin-rapido-ill
description: Rapido ILL connector plugin for Koha

scripts.preversion: sed -i -e "s/^our \$VERSION = .*/our \$VERSION = \"$npm_new_version\";/" Koha/Plugin/Com/ByWaterSolutions/RapidoILL.pm; perl scripts/stamp-changelog.pl v$npm_new_version; git add -u; rm -f Koha/Plugin/Com/ByWaterSolutions/RapidoILL.pm-e
scripts.postversion: perl scripts/open-next-changelog.pl v$npm_package_version; git add CHANGELOG.md; git commit -m 'Open next development cycle'

author: Tomás Cohen Arazi <tomascohen@theke.io>
